description: Legal document, quite faded. Dating: likely 12th or 13th century. Concerning the purchase and subsequent dedication of a property in the town of al-ʿAlāqma (near Bilbays) to the Heqdesh. Mentions Shemuel al-Kohen. Signed by ʿOvadya b. Shemuel.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
